lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Oh, it's you again! Well, what is it this time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any jobs or quests that I could do for you?

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Hah! There are plenty of things I need done, but something tells me you're not quite ready for them right now. Come back another time!

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: What do you want? ...Oh, wait. I know! You're probably just like all the others, aren't you? After some fancy spell or potion from me, I bet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? No! At least, I don't think so. What sort of spells do you have?

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Hah! I knew it! I expect you want my Aphro-Dizzy-Yak spell! Want someone to fall madly in love with you, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That spell sounds very interesting, but I didn't mean to disturb you!

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Well, I see that you do have some manners. I'm glad to see that you use them.

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Now, if it's all the same, I am very busy at the moment. Unless you want something specific, please come back another time.

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: Can't you see I'm very busy here? Be off with you!

lines.speaker: Surok Magis
lines.text: No thanks, I don't need that.
